title: Syngrammatopsis elaphoglossoides

taxonomy: Syngrammatopsis elaphoglossoides is a genus of ferns in the family Blechnaceae, and specifically, it belongs to the order Polypodiales. Within the kingdom Plantae, Syngrammatopsis elaphoglossoides is classified as a vascular plant. As a member of the family Blechnaceae, it is closely related to other genera such as Blechnum and Lomariopsis. Syngrammatopsis elaphoglossoides also shares characteristics with other plants in the order Polypodiales, which includes other families like Dryopteridaceae and Thelypteridaceae. The classification of Syngrammatopsis elaphoglossoides is further detailed within the domain Eukaryota.
